notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.message: This link doesn’t match anything in the app. It may be wrong or the screen may have moved.
notFound.resourceMessage: It may have been deleted, closed, or the link is out of date. Try going back or open the home feed.

auth.legalPrefix: By tapping Sign Up or Sign In, you agree to our
auth.legalPagesUnavailable: Legal pages are not configured yet.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to access your account.
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up

welcome.title:
Welcome,
this is PawTaker
welcome.subtitle: The community pet-sitting app
welcome.languageHint: Opens a menu to choose English or French

onboarding.slide1Body: Connect with verified, local caretakers who treat your pet like family. The right care is just a search and a tap away.
onboarding.slide2Body: From quick midday walks to long-time, find the perfect match for your routine. Manage every detail in one clean space.
onboarding.slide3Body: Every walk, stay, and playdate earns you points. No payments, no fees—just pet lovers helping pet lovers keep tails wagging.

credentials.title: Sign Up
credentials.subtitle: Enter your email and create a strong password for your new account.
credentials.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

verify.title: Check your email
verify.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to
verify.invalidCode: Invalid or expired code. Please try again.
verify.resendSuccess: A new code has been sent.

declaration.title: Community Agreement
declaration.subtitle: Please read and agree to our community standards
declaration.point1: I will treat all pets and their owners with respect.
declaration.point2: I will honor all care commitments I accept.
declaration.point3: I will communicate openly and honestly at all times.
declaration.hasHadPet: I have had a pet before

submit.title: Identity Verification
submit.subtitle: We need to verify your identity to ensure community safety
submit.nationalIdSubtitle: Upload a photo or scan of your document
submit.driversLicenseSubtitle: Upload a photo or scan of your driver's license
submit.passportSubtitle: Upload a photo or scan of your passport identity page
submit.selfieInstructions: Center your face in the frame and follow the instructions.
submit.pickSourceDescription: Choose an image from your gallery or take a new photo.
submit.galleryPermissionRequired: Photo library access is required to choose an image.
submit.misconfiguredUploads: Uploads are not configured on this build. Please contact support.
submit.uploadFailed: We couldn’t upload your photos. Please try again, or switch to a different network.
submit.fileTooLarge: That photo is too large. Please choose a smaller photo and try again.

pending.title: Verification Pending
pending.subtitle: We're reviewing your identity documents. This usually takes 24–48 hours.

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address associated with your account and we will send you a code to input to reset your password
forgotPassword.emailNotFound: Email not found. Try again or sign up
forgotPassword.codeSubtitlePrefix: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to
forgotPassword.invalidCode: Incorrect code. Please check your email and try again.

feed.title: Home
feed.searchPlaceholder: Search location, care type, pet type...
feed.noRequestsSubtitle: Try adjusting filters to find more.
feed.noTakersSubtitle: Try adjusting filters to find more.
feed.noPets: No pets need care right now

kycModal.title: Let's get you verified
kycModal.description: To keep our pet community safe — and so you can post requests, apply to pet-sitting jobs, and message other members — we need to quickly confirm your identity. It only takes a couple of minutes.
kycModal.pendingDescription: We're reviewing your documents. This usually takes 24–48 hours. Once approved, you can post requests, add pets, apply to pet-sitting jobs, and offer availability.
kycModal.rejectedDescription: We couldn’t approve your last submission. Please review the requirements and resubmit so you can apply for sits, message owners, and use the rest of the app.

myCare.title: My Care
myCare.applyingDescription: A message with your availability details will be sent to this pet's owner.

contract.title: Contract
contract.acceptHint: Accept the offer to unlock the agreement actions.
contract.acceptConfirmTitle: Are you sure you want to accept this offer?
contract.acceptDisclaimer: By tapping Accept Offer, you approve that anyone in the community can contact you in our chat system.
contract.terminateConfirmDescription: The other party will need to confirm before the agreement is fully ended.
contract.terminationPendingHint: Waiting for the other party to confirm.
contract.terminationPendingRequesterBody: The other party must also confirm before this agreement is fully terminated.
contract.terminationPendingRecipientBody: Confirm termination to fully end this agreement.
contract.reactivateConfirmDescription: This will cancel your termination request and keep the agreement active.
contract.acceptTerminationConfirmDescription: This will end the agreement and release points. This cannot be undone.
contract.terminationRequestedNotificationBody: {{name}} has requested to end the care agreement.
contract.terminationAcceptedNotificationBody: The other party confirmed the termination.
contract.needTaker: A caregiver must be matched on this request before you can sign.
contract.takerAlreadyCaring: This taker is currently active on another care agreement.

review.title: Leave a Review
review.intro: Share how the care went — ratings help keep the community trustworthy.
review.commentPlaceholder: What went well? Anything others should know?
review.noContract: No contract found for this care yet.
review.successSubtitle: Your review was submitted and helps others choose great caregivers.

offer.confirmDescription: This will send your care proposal to the pet owner.

messages.blockedByOtherBanner: This user has blocked you, so they can't message you and you can't message them.
